name: Drizzle schema, db client, and migration
outcome: A Drizzle schema reproduces the Postgres data model (including the three scope join tables) and a generated migration applies cleanly to a fresh database.
scope: Drizzle schema, db client, drizzle config, and the initial generated migration. Seed and repos are separate slices.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm db:migrate applies the generated migration to a fresh database without error
Schema defines users, oauthClients, oauthScopes, oauthAuthCodes, oauthTokens and join tables oauthClientScopes, oauthAuthCodeScopes, oauthTokenScopes
inet columns use Drizzle native inet(); allowedGrants and codeChallengeMethod use pgEnum; ids use uuid
steps: src/db/schema.ts — define pg-core tables users/oauthClients/oauthScopes/oauthAuthCodes/oauthTokens mirroring prisma/schema.prisma columns; uuid ids, inet() for createdIP/lastLoginIP, text arrays for redirectUris, pgEnum for allowedGrants and codeChallengeMethod
src/db/schema.ts — add explicit join tables oauthClientScopes, oauthAuthCodeScopes, oauthTokenScopes with composite primary keys and foreign keys
src/db/schema.ts — declare relations() for client/authCode/token <-> scope and user so db.query can load scopes via with
src/db/index.ts — create a postgres.js client from DATABASE_URL and export drizzle(client, { schema })
drizzle.config.ts — schema path, out ./drizzle, dialect postgresql, DATABASE_URL
package.json — set db:generate and db:migrate to drizzle-kit generate/migrate, then generate the initial migration into ./drizzle
notes: Types must match the original (@db.Uuid, @db.Inet, @db.VarChar, text[]/enum[]). Enums: GrantTypes (client_credentials/authorization_code/refresh_token/implicit/password), CodeChallengeMethod (S256/plain). Verify against a fresh DB (drop/recreate) since the dev DB already has prisma-created tables. prisma/ stays until cleanup.
